avatar.container: width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255,105,180,0.2); border: 2px solid rgba(255,182,193,0.5);

footer.container: position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px; padding: 16px; color: #E6859E; font-size: 13px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,182,193,0.4); background: rgba(255,245,247,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
footer.text: color: inherit; transition: color 0.2s ease; white-space: nowrap;

emphasis.em: font-style: normal; color: #D63384; background: rgba(255,182,193,0.2); padding: 0 4px; border-radius: 4px;

list.taskList: list-style: none; margin-left: -22px; font-size: 15px; color: #7A4B6A; line-height: 1.8;

code.block: background: #FFE4E9; padding: 1.2em; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; color: #D63384; margin: 1.3em 0; border: 1px solid rgba(255,182,193,0.4);
code.inline: background: #FFE4E9; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 6px; color: #D63384; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace;

styles.quote: border-left: 3px solid #FF69B4; padding: 0 0 0 18px; margin: 1.2em 0; color: #D63384; font-style: normal; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; background: rgba(255,182,193,0.1); border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1.3em auto; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(255,105,180,0.15);
styles.link: color: #FF69B4; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,105,180,0.3); transition: all 0.2s ease;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1.3em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(255,182,193,0.4);

styles.hr: border: none; border-top: 2px solid rgba(255,182,193,0.4); margin: 28px 0;
